system.description: There is something about the way you look that sticks in men’s minds. Perhaps you have a very memorable scar or tattoo; maybe you were born with six fingers on your left hand. Whatever it is, you have some superficial characteristic that causes you to stand out. You gain a Penalty Die whenever you try to disguise yourself or maintain a low profile. Bounty hunters and spies will also get a Bonus Die to seek you out.
